title: bidens cabopulmensis
intro: Bidens cabopulmensis, also known as Bidens pilosa var. radiata, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. Bidens cabopulmensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
